headline: 今日AI速览：学术研究最活跃
narrative:
今日共收录287篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究205篇, 开源项目40篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API12篇。热门标签：Agent（86篇）。其中14%的文章有多来源交叉验证。

▸ rohitg00 /ai-engineering-from-scratch：Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

▸ affaan-m /ECC：The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research

▸ mukul975 /Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills：754 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 5 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2

▸ colbymchenry /codegraph：Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, and Hermes Agent — fewer 

▸ manaflow-ai /cmux：Ghostty-based macOS terminal with vertical tabs and notifications for AI coding agents
text: 今日共收录287篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究205篇, 开源项目40篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API12篇。热门标签：Agent（86篇）。其中14%的文章有多来源交叉验证。
